category_sources: source_facts.description says CLI tools supporting SpatiaLite; official SpatiaLite cookbook describes spatialite-tools as CLI tools supporting SpatiaLite.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name; official Gaia-GIS Fossil project URL and cookbook refer to spatialite-tools.
docs_sources: Official Gaia-GIS SpatiaLite Cookbook documents Spatialite Tools; official Fossil page is the project surface.
repo_sources: Official Gaia-GIS cookbook gives fossil clone URL https://www.gaia-gis.it/fossil/spatialite-tools.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists spatialite command tools; official cookbook describes CLI tools and shapefile, DXF, GML, OSM, XML utilities.
